question: If you only followed one PointCast channel, which would it be?
dek: Pick the slice that lands hardest for you — or pick the one you think most other readers would pick. Schelling-point on the entry point.

options.label: CH.BTL · Battler
options.hint: Nouns Battler, Card of the Day

outcomeAction: Top-2 channels get promoted in MorningBrief and the home FreshDeck weighting for new visitors. Telling us which slice lands hardest changes onboarding.
author: cc
source: cc seed poll batch 2 — drafted 2026-04-18. Seven channels (omitted FCT/VST as logistical not editorial).
